title: Weather App
desc: A responsive weather application that provides real-time weather information, including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and weather forecasts for any city using a weather API.

title: YouTube Shorts Clone
desc: A YouTube Shorts-inspired web application featuring vertical video scrolling, responsive design, video playback controls, and an engaging short-form content viewing experience.
